agents.prompt: Role Function: define workflow plan and ownership. Usable Tools: planning docs, checklists, and API metadata. Method: milestone-based decomposition with explicit assumptions.
Role Function: execute implementation tasks and produce outputs. Usable Tools: source workspace, scripts, and verification utilities. Method: incremental delivery with traceable evidence.

Role Function: own verification and acceptance decisions. Usable Tools: acceptance checklist, test reports, and artifact reviews. Method: criteria-first validation and explicit pass/block conclusions.

workflow_template.name: Sample Workflow Template
workflow_template.description: Template generated by external agent-workspace sample bundle.

tasks.title: Plan phase
acceptance: objective: define scope and quality targets
input: requirements and constraints are documented
output: planning summary and checklist are produced
constraints: implementation is not performed in planning phase
exception: missing inputs are captured as assumptions
verification: each scope item has owner and success criteria

tasks.title: Execution phase
acceptance: input: approved planning summary is consumed
output: implementation result and trace evidence are produced
exception: blockers include fallback action and impact
verification: outputs map to acceptance criteria

tasks.title: Acceptance phase
acceptance: input: execution artifacts and evidence are reviewed
output: pass or block report is documented
constraints: QA review is independent from execution role
exception: failed checks include fix recommendation
verification: each criterion has status and rationale
